title: SpaceX IPO is a ‘referendum’ on Musk, say market watchers
summary_full: Friday's hotly anticipated SpaceX market debut could prove a defining moment for capital markets — and serve as a "referendum" on Elon Musk's leadership.
summary_public: Friday's hotly anticipated SpaceX market debut could prove a defining moment for capital markets — and serve as a "referendum" on Elon Musk's leadership.
